headline: Assessing NVR’s (NVR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Cooling And Mixed Longer Term Returns
summary: Why NVR (NVR) Is On Investors’ Radar Today NVR (NVR) is drawing fresh investor attention after recent returns show mixed momentum, with the stock down around 1% over the past day and modestly lower over the past week and month. See our latest analysis for NVR. While the recent 1-day, 7-day and 30-day share price returns show some cooling momentum around the latest close of US$7,415.75, the 1-year and multi year total shareholder returns suggest longer term holders have still seen meaningfully...

headline: Is NVR (NVR) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Pause?
summary: If you are wondering whether NVR at around US$7,415.75 a share still offers fair value or is pricing in too much optimism, you are not alone. The stock has been relatively steady recently, with a 0.6% decline over the last 7 days and a 2.9% decline over 30 days, while returns sit at 1.9% year to date, 3.0% over 1 year, 41.4% over 3 years, and 57.8% over 5 years. Recent coverage of NVR has focused on its position in the US homebuilding and mortgage markets and how the share price performance...
